name: Ocal Browser V6.7.13
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 6.7.13 Stable
Release Date: June 11, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[SETTINGS & CONFIGURATION REDESIGN]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* REDESIGNED SETTINGS PANELS: Styled cards, custom lime-neon toggle switches, color picker droplets, choice grids, search provider rows, custom radios, and default action buttons in settings.css with light-theme support.
* DOCUMENT & TAB TITLE: Locked settings page title strictly to 'Ocal Settings'.
* DROPDOWN SCROLLBAR CRASH RESOLUTION: Refactored bm-dropdown.html scrollbars to class scope to resolve Chromium renderer crashes caused by global viewport scrollbar style loops.
* TOPBAR ACTIONS REWIRING: Bookmarks folders redirect to left Bookmarks Sidebar instead of popup, downloads button toggles downloads tab inside left sidebar, start page history button fixed to trigger correct main process switch-sidebar-tab IPC event.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[INTERFACE POLISHING & REFINEMENTS]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* AI SIDEBAR CLEANUP: Removed the 'Theme' button quick-tool chip and its JS event listeners.
* DYNAMIC SAVE DIALOG FILTERS: Set proper dynamic extension filters in download/save dialog (e.g. Image Files for png/jpg, Archive Files for zip, PDF Document for pdf) instead of generic 'All Files'.
* PREMIUM MODAL SYSTEM REDESIGN: Redesigned the 'Confirm Exit' modal with a modern, glassmorphic layout, backdrop blur, smooth bounce transition, Inter typography, customized capsule buttons, and light theme adaptations.
